name: IZOWAVE - Build and Defend
author: Poki
description: IZOWAVE - Build and Defend is a strategy game offering a survival challenge against relentless waves of attacks in an expansive open world! Select your map and mode, embarking on an adventure alongside your assistant, facing increasingly powerful enemies and attacks. Build towers to attack, generators for resources, walls for defense, ammunition to reload ammo, boosters to increase tower efficiency, and more. Upgrade your and your assistant's stats, explore to collect gems, and save your progress at any point you want! How long can you last in the dangerous world? How to play IZOWAVE - Build and Defend? WASD: Move Left click: Build Right click: Stop building E: Upgrade building R: Repair building F: Buy ammo Backspace: Destroy building Who created IZOWAVE - Build and Defend? IZOWAVE - Build and Defend is created by Neki. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play IZOWAVE - Build and Defend for free? You can play IZOWAVE - Build and Defend for free on Poki. Can I play IZOWAVE - Build and Defend on mobile devices and desktop? IZOWAVE - Build and Defend can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
